underlying_goal: Update CLAUDE.md with web-UI context hints, diagnose why context/token usage was dramatically lower than usual, and test @-linking injection, then write a SKOGAI.md summary from current context only
brief_summary: User asked to update CLAUDE.md with web-UI hints, explored why their context was unusually lean (195 tokens system prompt vs usual 50k), tested @-linking injection, and had Claude write a SKOGAI.md from memory — all completed smoothly with an enthusiastic user.
